title: Packs / Xananode Canonical / Assets / Raw / Protocol / Examples / Minimal Substrate / Nodes / README
summary: packs/xananode-canonical/assets/raw/protocol/examples/minimal-substrate/nodes/README.md is preserved as a raw Core SDK source artifact in the XanaNode Core SDK substrate.
content:
# Nodes

Each file in this directory is a node.

Every node in this example includes relationship references. This is intentional: the example should demonstrate a connected substrate, not just isolated nodes plus a trail.

The canonical relationship list lives in `../relationships.json`.
